message.content: 只做只读研究，不要写代码。目标：查找 LFP2D 里与“特殊世界地图节点 UI/逻辑”最接近的现有实现模式，优先看商店、雇佣市场、节点数据资产、GameInstance 持久化。需要回答：1) 雇佣市场/商店当前的数据流（节点数据资产 -> 世界地图管理器/控制器 -> UI Widget -> GameInstance 持久化）；2) 是否已有“选择目标节点/快速移动/地图快照恢复”相关能力可复用；3) 新增传送阵时应复用哪些现有结构，避免重复造轮子；4) 给出关键文件和关键函数，尽量带行号。请控制在 250 词内。

content.thinking:
**Investigating data flow**

I'm looking to understand the current data flow regarding shop and hire markets, world map nodes, and GameInstance persistence. I think I need to check for relevant files with methods like Glob, Grep, and Read. It might be a good idea to inspect the top-level first and utilize parallel globbing to find names related to shop, hire, market, world map, node, and fast travel. This should help with target node selection and map snapshot restoration!

input.pattern: 雇佣|商店|world map|WorldMap|NodeData|GameInstance|快速移动|传送|fast travel|snapshot|SaveMap|RestoreMap|Hire|Market|Shop

content.thinking:
**Researching file details**

I need to keep everything read-only. Using Todo might be unnecessary unless things get complex. It seems I should focus on using Read without omitting any pages, and I might consider mentioning plan mode if needed for writing a plan file, but since the user asked for research, it doesn’t seem necessary. I'll gather specific data flow and capabilities, then look for key functions with line numbers, perhaps using Grep for specific function names and reading relevant .cpp files.

19	
20	public:
21		ALFPWorldMapManager();
22	
23	protected:
24		virtual void BeginPlay() override;
25	
26	public:
27		// ============== 节点管理 ==============
28	
29		// 生成节点

31		ALFPWorldMapNode* SpawnNode(int32 NodeID, FVector2D Position, ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType);
32	
33		// 移除节点（同时移除关联边）

36

40

44	
45		// 生成下一个可用 NodeID

47		int32 GetNextNodeID() const;
48	
49		// ============== 边管理 ==============
50	
51		// 添加边
52		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
53		ALFPWorldMapEdge* AddEdge(int32 FromID, int32 ToID, int32 TurnCost = 1);
54	
55		// 移除边
56		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
57		bool RemoveEdge(int32 FromID, int32 ToID);
58	
59		// 获取两节点之间的边
60		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
61		ALFPWorldMapEdge* GetEdge(int32 FromID, int32 ToID) const;
62	
63		// ============== 地图操作 ==============
64	
65		// 清除所有节点和边
66		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
67		void ClearMap();
68	
69		// ============== CSV 保存/加载 ==============
70	
71		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
72		bool SaveWorldMap(const FString& MapName);
73	
74		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")
75		bool LoadWorldMap(const FString& MapName);
76	
77		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map")

134	
135		// 棋子是否正在移动中
136		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
137		bool IsPawnMoving() const;
138	
139		// 获取玩家棋子
140		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map")
141		ALFPWorldMapPawn* GetPlayerPawn() const { return PlayerPawn; }
142	
143	protected:
144		// 节点注册表：NodeID → Node Actor
145		UPROPERTY()
146		TMap<int32, ALFPWorldMapNode*> NodeMap;
147	
148		// 边注册表：EdgeKey → Edge Actor（EdgeKey = MakeEdgeKey(From, To)）
149		UPROPERTY()
150		TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPWorldMapEdge*> EdgeMap;
151	
152		// 邻接表：NodeID → 相邻 NodeID 集合
153		TMap<int32, TSet<int32>> AdjacencyList;
154	
155		// 节点 → 关联的 EdgeKey 列表（用于删除节点时清理边）
156		TMap<int32, TArray<FIntPoint>> NodeEdgeIndex;
157	
158		// Node Actor 子类（蓝图中配置）
159		UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map")
160		TSubclassOf<ALFPWorldMapNode> NodeActorClass;
161	
162		// Edge Actor 子类（蓝图中配置）
163		UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map")
164		TSubclassOf<ALFPWorldMapEdge> EdgeActorClass;
165	
166		// 节点类型视觉注册表（蓝图中配置）
167		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map|Registry")
168		TMap<ELFPWorldNodeType, TObjectPtr<ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset>> NodeVisualRegistry;
169	
170		// 边精灵（所有边共用，蓝图中配置）
171		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map|Registry")
172		TObjectPtr<UPaperSprite> EdgeSprite;
173	
174		// 迷雾视野范围（图距离，经过几条边）
175		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map|Fog")
176		int32 FogVisionRange = 2;
177	
178		// 玩家状态
179		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Map")
180		TObjectPtr<ULFPWorldMapPlayerState> PlayerState;
181	
182		// 玩家棋子类（蓝图中配置）
183		UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "World Map|Pawn")
184		TSubclassOf<ALFPWorldMapPawn> PawnActorClass;
185	
186		// 玩家棋子实例
187		UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "World Map|Pawn")
188		TObjectPtr<ALFPWorldMapPawn> PlayerPawn;
189	
190		// ID 计数器
191		int32 NextNodeID = 0;
192	
193		// 当前世界地图名
194		FString CurrentWorldMapName;
195	
196		// 世界地图保存目录
197		FString GetWorldMapSaveDirectory() const;
198	
199		// 生成无向边的统一 Key（始终 Min, Max）
200		static FIntPoint MakeEdgeKey(int32 A, int32 B);
201	
202	private:
203		// CSV 读写辅助
204		bool SaveNodesToCSV(const FString& FilePath);
205		bool SaveEdgesToCSV(const FString& FilePath);
206		bool LoadNodesFromCSV(const FString& FilePath);
207		bool LoadEdgesFromCSV(const FString& FilePath);
208	
209		// 棋子移动完成回调
210		UFUNCTION()
211		void OnPawnMoveComplete();
212	
213		// 移动完成后执行迷雾更新和节点事件
214		void HandlePostMove(int32 TargetNodeID);
215	
216		// 缓存的目标节点 ID（棋子移动期间保存）
217		int32 PendingMoveTargetNodeID = -1;
218	};

content.text:
结论：最接近“特殊世界地图节点 UI/逻辑”的现有模式，其实是“节点 CSV/Actor 参数 + PlayerController 分发 + Widget 直接读写 GameInstance”；`ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset` 目前只管视觉，不承载商店/雇佣逻辑。

1) 现有数据流  
商店/雇佣市场都是：`FLFPWorldNodeRow.ShopID/HireMarketID` -> `ALFPWorldMapNode` 字段 -> `ALFPWorldMapPlayerController::EnterNode/OpenShop/OpenHireMarket` -> `ULFPGameInstance::FindShopDefinition/FindHireMarketDefinition` -> `ULFPShopWidget::Setup` / `ULFPHireMarketWidget::Setup` -> Widget 内调用 `TryPurchaseRelic` / `TrySpendForUnit` / `TryAddUnit` 持久化到 GI。关键点：配置表挂在 `GameInstance`，不是挂在节点视觉资产。  
2) 可复用能力  
已有“目标节点选择/相邻移动/移动后自动进入”：`SelectNode`、`MoveToNode`、`PendingEnterNode`、`GetReachableNodeIDs`。已有“地图快照恢复”：战斗前 `SaveWorldMapSnapshot`，回世界地图时 `WorldMapGameMode::StartPlay` 恢复地图/当前位置/visited/revealed/triggered。没有现成“任意节点快速移动/传送 UI”；城镇传送仅有占位：`TBT_Teleport`、`TeleportTargetNodeIDs`、`OnTeleportClicked`，控制器里还是 TODO。  
3) 新增传送阵建议  
复用：城镇建筑入口、`TownWidget` 事件分发、`PlayerController` 打开专用 Widget、GI 做跨关卡/全局状态、`PlayerState/Manager` 做落点与可见性刷新。避免把功能配置塞进 `ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset`。  
4) 关键文件  
- `/d/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-ae3e9a18/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp` 423, 472, 592, 656, 763  
- `/d/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-ae3e9a18/Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h` 86, 151, 259, 273；`.cpp` 41, 190, 258, 263, 297  
- `/d/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-ae3e9a18/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapGameMode.cpp` 35-65  
- `/d/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-ae3e9a18/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapManager.cpp` 626, 662, 703, 738  
- `/d/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-ae3e9a18/Source/LFP2D/Town/LFPTownData.h` 13, 40；`/UI/Town/LFPTownWidget.cpp` 17, 67  
- `/d/UE_Projects/LFP2D/.claude/worktrees/agent-ae3e9a18/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h` 77-87；`LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h` 11-38
